description: Dense, data-rich layout for power users. Sidebar + three-panel content area: overview, tradelines table, action queue. Inspired by Bloomberg terminal aesthetics.

css_layout_rules..layout-dashboard-v3: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden;
css_layout_rules..sidebar-narrow: width: 200px; overflow-y: auto; border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
css_layout_rules..command-center: display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden;
css_layout_rules..command-header: height: 52px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 1.5rem; flex-shrink: 0;
css_layout_rules..three-panel: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr 300px; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;
